entity_evidence.text: A controller that has obtained personal data about a consumer from a source other than the consumer

type_evidence.text: is considered in compliance with a consumer’s request to delete the consumer's personal data under § 4-120-201(b)(3)

attribute_evidence.text: by: (1) Retaining a record of the deletion request and the minimum data necessary for the purpose of ensuring the consumer’s personal data remains deleted form the business’s records

value_evidence.text: and not using the retained data for any other purpose under this chapter
